subcodes.first_line: Praise be unto Him Who alone is worthy and befitting, Who hath caused the living waters of divine knowledge to flow forth without distinction or regard for station [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: حمد مقصودی را لایق و سزاست که کوثر حیوان عرفانرا من غیر تفاوت و ملاحظه شئون بر
subcodes.subjects: @exhortations and counsels, @spiritual meetings; gatherings; devotional gatherings; feasts, @unity; oneness of humanity, @praise and encouragement, @wisdom [hikmat]
